headline: Coinbase Bets on AI Trading With Pre-IPO of OpenAI, Anthropic?
summary: Coinbase expands pre-IPO trading to OpenAI and Anthropic, aiming to diversify beyond crypto and build next-generation capital markets infrastructure.

headline: IBKR Broadens AI Trading Reach With ChatGPT, Grok Integration
summary: Interactive Brokers is expanding AI-assisted trading with ChatGPT and Grok, adding options and futures while keeping investors in control.
